projectDescription: A baseline code quality configuration for Angular projects using Vite+, providing TypeScript linting via oxlint, SCSS linting via Stylelint, Angular HTML template linting via ESLint, formatting via oxfmt, and automated pre-commit enforcement.
keyFeatures: TypeScript and JavaScript linting with oxlint including Angular-specific rules
Angular HTML template linting via ESLint flat config with accessibility rules
CSS and SCSS linting with Stylelint using standard SCSS and recess-order presets
Code formatting with oxfmt (single quotes, semicolons, trailing commas)
Automated pre-commit hook via vite-plus staged-file orchestration
Staged-file-only checks for fast commit feedback
Test and mock file overrides that relax certain lint rules
Cross-platform postinstall script to auto-install the Git hook
publicApiSurface: vp lint — run oxlint across the project
vp lint --fix — run oxlint with auto-fix
vp fmt — format all files with oxfmt
vp fmt --check — check formatting without writing
vp staged — run staged-file checks (used by pre-commit hook)
vp check — run all linters and format checks
vp check --fix — run all linters and format checks with auto-fix
eslint src/**/*.html — lint Angular HTML templates
eslint.config.ts — ESLint flat config for Angular templates
vite.config.ts — vite-plus staged-file mapping and lint ignore patterns
